name: Turkey Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
Rinse corn husks and remove silk. Cover husks with warm water and let stand until softened, at least 2 hours. Prepare Almond Red Sauce by mixing 1/2 cup of the sauce with remaining ingredients except Tamale Dough and sour cream; reserve. Beat all Tamale Dough ingredients in a large bowl on low speed until well blended. Beat on medium speed for an additional minute.
Prepare tamale dough. Heat oven to 350°F. Drain corn husks and pat dry. Line greased springform pan (10 X 3-inches) with corn husks, extending pointed ends over the side of the pan. Spread half of the Tamale Dough over the husks on the bottom of the pan; cover with turkey mixture. Spread remaining dough over turkey mixture up to the edge of the pan. Cover top of pan with heavy-duty aluminum foil (15 inches long), shaping down over the side of the pan. Bake until dough is set and slightly dry, about 1 1/2 hours. Carefully remove side of pan. Serve with remaining warm Almond Red Sauce and sour cream.
